summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Volume Bot Organic Mode features (Iteration 5). All 27 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified new 'Tryb Organiczny' bar with Holdery, BUY od sprzedazy, Ostatnia akcja fields - all working correctly when bot is running.

issues: ESLint warning: useCallback has missing dependency 'h' on line 83 - causes stale closure but doesn't break functionality

test_classes: TestOrganicModeStatusFields (4 tests): token_holders, buys_since_sell, last_action fields present and correct types
TestBotConfigUpdate (7 tests): token_mint, target_volume_sol, trade_intervals, sol_per_trade, slippage_bps, auto_refund, min_wallet_balance
TestBotStartStop (4 tests): start, status when running, stop, double-start handling
TestCostCalculator (2 tests): all fields present, values are numeric
TestWalletEndpoints (2 tests): get wallets, generate wallets
TestAuthProtection (6 tests): all admin endpoints require auth
TestCleanup (2 tests): bot stopped, config restored

stats_row.volume_dzienny: Shows daily volume with progress bar
stats_row.makers: Shows makers count with progress bar

bot_controls.running_badge: AKTYWNY badge appears when bot running

admin_dashboard.transaction_log: Shows Log Transakcji with transaction history

critical_code_review_comments: New organic mode fields (token_holders, buys_since_sell, last_action) properly implemented in VolumeBot.get_status()

Organic bot logic correctly implements: different wallets for buy/sell, Gaussian amount distribution, partial sells (30-80%), buy accumulation before sells (2-5 buys), cooldown preventing same wallet consecutive trades
'Tryb Organiczny' bar in Admin.jsx correctly shows/hides based on bot running state
All config fields properly labeled in Polish (sekundy for intervals)
Minor: ESLint warning about missing 'h' dependency in useCallback - recommend adding 'h' to dependency array or memoizing headers object
seed_data_creation: Generated 2 test wallets during testing (cleaned up)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Volume Bot Organic Mode fully tested. New features verified: 1) /api/admin/bot/status returns token_holders, buys_since_sell, last_action fields, 2) Frontend 'Tryb Organiczny' bar shows these fields when bot is running (line 149-156 in Admin.jsx), 3) Bot start/stop cycle resets organic counters correctly. All 27 backend tests pass. Note: Actual Solana trades cannot be tested without funded wallets - the bot will start but won't execute real trades. Previous iteration tests (wallet CRUD, distribute/collect SOL) still valid.
rca_of_issue: No issues found. All organic mode features working as expected.
